en: If your company is required to comply with Germany Safety Statement Certification requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form.
Germany Safety Statement Certification Applicability Assessment
Is your company required to maintain a Germany Safety Statement Certification in compliance with Federal Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs regulations?
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from needing a Germany Safety Statement Certification.
The company is a Sole Proprietorship
The company has fewer than a set number of employees (below 10, depending on industry and risk level).
The company operates exclusively with non-hazardous materials or in low-risk sectors.
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing a Germany Safety Statement Certification.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Germany legislation.
